Capabilities Work Articles About GitHub

About

Senior software architect focused on reliable production systems.

I work at the intersection of software architecture, data platforms, forecasting systems, and AI-enabled applications.

Architecture and delivery

My work centers on decomposing complex business problems into well-structured software systems and scalable data architectures — from backend services and APIs to distributed data processing, analytics foundations, and operational dashboards.

Data-intensive systems

I have deep experience with data extraction, ingestion, normalization, transformation, analytics enablement, data lakes, warehouses, and serving layers across heterogeneous operational systems.

AI-era systems

I evaluate and build with LLMs, embeddings, vector databases, retrieval-augmented generation, model experimentation frameworks, and agentic AI patterns — always with an emphasis on production fit and maintainability.

Engagement fit

Best fit: senior architecture, high-impact consulting, advisory work, data/platform leadership, AI-enabled system design, modernization, and production delivery where correctness and long-term maintainability matter.
